system.description: Classic horned hatchling with major psionics, solid fire breath, and the broadest early psychic growth of the first-edition dragons.
system.notes: Play this dragon as the all-around hatchling from first edition: physically mighty, magically aware, and gifted with a broad psionic talent.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak Dragonese/Elven and one additional spoken language at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Literacy
occSkills.notes: Read and write Dragonese/Elven at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Mathematics - Basic
occSkills.notes: Dragon instinct grants Basic Math at 98% proficiency.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Statistics
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll I.Q. 5D6, M.A. 4D6, M.E. 5D6, P.S. 6D6, P.P. 4D6, P.E. 5D6, P.B. 6D6, and Spd 4D6. Horror Factor 12. P.P.E. is 2D6x10. Start with 1D4x100+50 M.D.C.

grantedAbilities.name: Natural Dragon Abilities
grantedAbilities.notes: Fly 70 mph, see the invisible, see in the dark, resist fire and cold for half damage, and bio-regenerate 1D4x10 M.D.C. every five minutes. Metamorphosis lasts two hours per level and teleport begins at 28% plus 2% per level.

grantedAbilities.name: Breath Weapon
grantedAbilities.notes: Breathe fire for 2D6 M.D. out to 60 feet.

grantedAbilities.name: Magic Knowledge
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling understands the principles of magic, can use techno-wizard devices instinctively, read magic, use scrolls, recognize circles and enchantment, and sense ley lines, nexus points, and other dragons within the listed ranges.

grantedAbilities.name: Psionic Development
grantedAbilities.notes: Choose eight psionic powers from any category except Super Psionics at level one, then four more at levels 5 and 10. Start with 3D4x10 I.S.P.

grantedAbilities.name: Spell Learning
grantedAbilities.notes: Beginning at level three, learn and cast two new spells per level of experience by the usual means.

grantedAbilities.name: Hand to Hand Training
grantedAbilities.notes: Fight as Hand to Hand: Basic and begin with one additional melee attack.

grantedAbilities.name: Adult Growth
grantedAbilities.notes: At about 600 years of age the hatchling reaches full maturity and its physical attributes increase dramatically, becoming a young adult dragon.

unresolvedNotes: Use the six first-level skill picks and later four-skill gains only from Communications, Domestic, Military, Pilot, Pilot Related, Rogue, Technical, and Wilderness.
Speak Dragonese/Elven and one additional language at 98%, and use Basic Math at 98%.
Roll hatchling age from the first-edition table and choose final alignment by level three.

system.description: Impervious-to-fire hatchling with devastating flame breath and a narrower, discipline-bound minor psionic tradition.
system.notes: Play this dragon as a hot-blooded hunter whose breath weapon does the heavy lifting while its psionics stay focused in a single discipline.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak Dragonese/Elven and one additional spoken language at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Literacy
occSkills.notes: Read and write Dragonese/Elven at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Mathematics - Basic
occSkills.notes: Dragon instinct grants Basic Math at 98% proficiency.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Statistics
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll I.Q. 4D6, M.A. 4D6, M.E. 4D6, P.S. 5D6, P.P. 4D6, P.E. 5D6, P.B. 5D6, and Spd 5D6. Horror Factor 12. P.P.E. is 2D4x10. Start with 1D4x100 M.D.C.

grantedAbilities.name: Natural Dragon Abilities
grantedAbilities.notes: Fly 50 mph, see the invisible, see in the dark, ignore all fire damage, and bio-regenerate 1D4x10 M.D.C. every five minutes. Metamorphosis lasts two hours per level and teleport begins at 22% plus 2% per level.

grantedAbilities.name: Breath Weapon
grantedAbilities.notes: Breathe fire for 6D6 M.D. out to 60 feet.

grantedAbilities.name: Magic Knowledge
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling understands the principles of magic, can use techno-wizard devices instinctively, read magic, use scrolls, recognize circles and enchantment, and sense ley lines, nexus points, and other dragons within the listed ranges.

grantedAbilities.name: Psionic Development
grantedAbilities.notes: Choose six minor psionic powers at level one and two more at levels 5 and 10. All choices must come from a single discipline: Sensitive, Physical, or Healing. Start with 1D6x10 I.S.P.

grantedAbilities.name: Spell Learning
grantedAbilities.notes: Beginning at level three, learn and cast two new spells per level of experience by the usual means.

grantedAbilities.name: Hand to Hand Training
grantedAbilities.notes: Fight as Hand to Hand: Basic and begin with one additional melee attack.

grantedAbilities.name: Adult Growth
grantedAbilities.notes: At about 600 years of age the hatchling reaches full maturity and its physical attributes increase dramatically, becoming a young adult dragon.

unresolvedNotes: Use the six first-level skill picks and later four-skill gains only from Communications, Domestic, Military, Pilot, Pilot Related, Rogue, Technical, and Wilderness.
Speak Dragonese/Elven and one additional language at 98%, and use Basic Math at 98%.
Roll hatchling age from the first-edition table and choose final alignment by level three.

system.description: Cold-impervious hatchling that trades fire for a brutal frost breath while keeping the same narrow minor-psionic discipline as the fire dragon.
system.notes: Play this dragon as a patient ambusher from the frozen wilds, relying on resilience, frost breath, and a single psionic discipline.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak Dragonese/Elven and one additional spoken language at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Literacy
occSkills.notes: Read and write Dragonese/Elven at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Mathematics - Basic
occSkills.notes: Dragon instinct grants Basic Math at 98% proficiency.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Statistics
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll I.Q. 4D6, M.A. 4D6, M.E. 4D6, P.S. 5D6, P.P. 4D6, P.E. 5D6, P.B. 5D6, and Spd 5D6. Horror Factor 10. P.P.E. is 2D4x10. Start with 1D4x100 M.D.C.

grantedAbilities.name: Natural Dragon Abilities
grantedAbilities.notes: Fly 50 mph, see the invisible, see in the dark, ignore all cold damage, and bio-regenerate 1D4x10 M.D.C. every five minutes. Metamorphosis lasts two hours per level and teleport begins at 22% plus 2% per level.

grantedAbilities.name: Breath Weapon
grantedAbilities.notes: Breathe ice for 5D6 M.D. out to 60 feet.

grantedAbilities.name: Magic Knowledge
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling understands the principles of magic, can use techno-wizard devices instinctively, read magic, use scrolls, recognize circles and enchantment, and sense ley lines, nexus points, and other dragons within the listed ranges.

grantedAbilities.name: Psionic Development
grantedAbilities.notes: Choose six minor psionic powers at level one and two more at levels 5 and 10. All choices must come from a single discipline: Sensitive, Physical, or Healing. Start with 1D6x10 I.S.P.

grantedAbilities.name: Spell Learning
grantedAbilities.notes: Beginning at level three, learn and cast two new spells per level of experience by the usual means.

grantedAbilities.name: Hand to Hand Training
grantedAbilities.notes: Fight as Hand to Hand: Basic and begin with one additional melee attack.

grantedAbilities.name: Adult Growth
grantedAbilities.notes: At about 600 years of age the hatchling reaches full maturity and its physical attributes increase dramatically, becoming a young adult dragon.

unresolvedNotes: Use the six first-level skill picks and later four-skill gains only from Communications, Domestic, Military, Pilot, Pilot Related, Rogue, Technical, and Wilderness.
Speak Dragonese/Elven and one additional language at 98%, and use Basic Math at 98%.
Roll hatchling age from the first-edition table and choose final alignment by level three.

system.description: Wingless, tough hatchling with magical paralysis breath and a slightly faster spell growth curve than the other first-edition dragons.
system.notes: Play this dragon as a grounded bruiser whose poison vapor and teleportation make up for the lack of wings.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak Dragonese/Elven and one additional spoken language at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Literacy
occSkills.notes: Read and write Dragonese/Elven at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Mathematics - Basic
occSkills.notes: Dragon instinct grants Basic Math at 98% proficiency.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Statistics
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll I.Q. 4D6, M.A. 4D6, M.E. 5D6, P.S. 5D6, P.P. 4D6, P.E. 5D6, P.B. 4D6, and Spd 6D6. Horror Factor 11. P.P.E. is 2D4x10+10. Start with 1D4x100+50 M.D.C.

grantedAbilities.name: Natural Dragon Abilities
grantedAbilities.notes: See the invisible, see in the dark, resist fire and cold for half damage, and bio-regenerate 1D4x10 M.D.C. every five minutes. The thunder lizard has no wings and cannot fly. Metamorphosis lasts two hours per level and teleport begins at 26% plus 2% per level.

grantedAbilities.name: Breath Weapon
grantedAbilities.notes: Exhale magical poison vapor out to 60 feet. Victims without an independent oxygen supply are paralyzed for 2D6 melees unless they save versus magic on a 13 or better.

grantedAbilities.name: Magic Knowledge
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling understands the principles of magic, can use techno-wizard devices instinctively, read magic, use scrolls, recognize circles and enchantment, and sense ley lines, nexus points, and other dragons within the listed ranges.

grantedAbilities.name: Psionic Development
grantedAbilities.notes: Choose six minor psionic powers at level one and two more at levels 5 and 10. All choices must come from a single discipline: Sensitive, Physical, or Healing. Start with 2D4x10 I.S.P.

grantedAbilities.name: Spell Learning
grantedAbilities.notes: Beginning at level three, learn three spells by the usual means, then two new spells per level of experience thereafter.

grantedAbilities.name: Hand to Hand Training
grantedAbilities.notes: Fight as Hand to Hand: Basic and begin with one additional melee attack.

grantedAbilities.name: Adult Growth
grantedAbilities.notes: At about 600 years of age the hatchling reaches full maturity and its physical attributes increase dramatically, becoming a young adult dragon.

unresolvedNotes: Use the six first-level skill picks and later four-skill gains only from Communications, Domestic, Military, Pilot, Pilot Related, Rogue, Technical, and Wilderness.
Speak Dragonese/Elven and one additional language at 98%, and use Basic Math at 98%.
Roll hatchling age from the first-edition table and choose final alignment by level three.

system.description: Stealthy feline dragon with entrancing eyes, strong charm magic, and a single chosen minor psionic discipline.
system.notes: Play this hatchling as a proud night hunter and manipulator. Cat's-Eye dragons stalk, charm, and toy with prey before closing for the kill.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak Dragonese/Elven at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Literacy
occSkills.notes: Read and write Dragonese/Elven at the base skill percentage.

occSkills.name: Mathematics - Basic
occSkills.notes: Use Basic Math at the base skill percentage as an instinctive dragon skill.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Statistics
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll I.Q. 3D6+5, M.E. 3D6+4, M.A. 3D6+6, P.S. 3D6+12 (Supernatural), P.P. 3D6+5, P.E. 3D6+9, P.B. 3D6+6, and Spd 3D6+12 running or 1D6x10+55 flying. Horror Factor 12. Start with 1D4x100+50 M.D.C., 2D6x10 P.P.E., and 2D4x10 I.S.P.

grantedAbilities.name: Natural Dragon Abilities
grantedAbilities.notes: Nightvision 6000 feet, see the invisible, turn invisible at will, resist fire and cold for half damage, use a prehensile tail, and bio-regenerate 1D10 M.D.C. per melee round. Metamorphosis lasts two hours per level and teleport begins at 28% plus 2% per level.

grantedAbilities.name: Magic Knowledge
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling understands magic completely, can use Techno-Wizard gear instinctively, read magic, use scrolls, recognize circles and enchantment, sense ley lines and nexus points within 20 miles, and identify other dragons on sight even through metamorphosis.

grantedAbilities.name: Spell Learning
grantedAbilities.notes: Learn spells beginning at second level. By third level the dragon should know 2D4+2 spells from levels 1-3, by fifth level another 2D4+2 from levels 3-8, and thereafter three new spells per level up to its current experience level. Two spells can be cast per melee round, and Spell Strength rises by +1 at level 9.

grantedAbilities.name: Dragon Growth
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling reaches young adulthood at about 600 years of age. Adults increase mental attributes by 1D4+2 each, gain +1D6+4 to P.S. and P.P., +1D6+10 Spd, ten times the M.D.C., double all listed bonuses, and vastly greater I.S.P. and P.P.E.

grantedAbilities.name: Child of Magic
grantedAbilities.notes: Play the hatchling as a young dragon discovering the world. Alignment usually begins as Unprincipled or Anarchist, then settles into a final moral outlook by level three.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Gift
grantedAbilities.notes: Use Cat's-Eye Gaze to charm and control victims who meet the dragon's eyes and fail to save versus mind control on a 14 or better. Up to three victims per level can be controlled for two minutes per level. Fire breath does 3D6 M.D. to a six-foot-wide blast up to 60 feet and may be used three times per melee, each counting as an attack.

unresolvedNotes: Select two secondary skills at level one and two more at levels 2, 4, 8, 10, and 15. Use only the dragon's I.Q. bonus on these skills.
Choose six minor psionic powers at first level and two more at levels 5 and 10, all from one chosen discipline: Sensitive, Physical, or Healing.
Choose one special interest at levels 1, 3, 6, 9, 12, and 15 from Languages, Literacy, Lore, or Research. If Research is not available, choose from the other listed interests.
Handle the rolled spell totals from the class text during advancement rather than treating them as fixed picks.

system.description: Blazing red dragon that lives in its own fire, punishes grapplers, and grows through a single line of minor psionic talent.
system.notes: Play this hatchling as a dramatic burner of foes and scenery alike. A Flame Wind can dominate the battlefield simply by becoming too dangerous to touch.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak Dragonese/Elven at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Literacy
occSkills.notes: Read and write Dragonese/Elven at the base skill percentage.

occSkills.name: Mathematics - Basic
occSkills.notes: Use Basic Math at the base skill percentage as an instinctive dragon skill.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Statistics
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll I.Q. 3D6+5, M.E. 3D6+5, M.A. 3D6+5, P.S. 3D6+5 (Supernatural), P.P. 3D6+10, P.E. 3D6+10, P.B. 3D6+5, and Spd 3D6+10 running or 3D6x10 flying. Horror Factor 12, or 14 while aflame. Start with 1D4x100 M.D.C., 2D4x10+10 P.P.E., and 1D6x10 I.S.P.

grantedAbilities.name: Natural Dragon Abilities
grantedAbilities.notes: Nightvision 100 feet, thermal vision 300 feet, invisibility at will, total immunity to fire, a prehensile tail, and bio-regeneration of 1D10 M.D.C. per melee round. Metamorphosis lasts one hour per level and teleport begins at 22% plus 2% per level.

grantedAbilities.name: Magic Knowledge
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling understands magic completely, can use Techno-Wizard gear instinctively, read magic, use scrolls, recognize circles and enchantment, sense ley lines and nexus points within 20 miles, and identify other dragons on sight even through metamorphosis.

grantedAbilities.name: Spell Learning
grantedAbilities.notes: Learn spells beginning at second level. By third level the dragon should know 2D4+2 spells from levels 1-3, by fifth level another 2D4+2 from levels 3-8, and thereafter three new spells per level up to its current experience level. Two spells can be cast per melee round, and Spell Strength rises by +1 at level 9.

grantedAbilities.name: Dragon Growth
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling reaches young adulthood at about 600 years of age. Adults increase mental attributes by 1D4+2 each, gain +1D6+4 to P.S. and P.P., +1D6+10 Spd, ten times the M.D.C., double all listed bonuses, and vastly greater I.S.P. and P.P.E.

grantedAbilities.name: Child of Magic
grantedAbilities.notes: Play the hatchling as a young dragon discovering the world. Alignment usually begins as Unprincipled or Anarchist, then settles into a final moral outlook by level three.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Gift
grantedAbilities.notes: Flaming Scales let the dragon burst into real fire for one minute per level, adding 2D6 M.D. to punches and tail strikes and inflicting 4D6 M.D. every four seconds on anyone wrestling or clinging to the dragon. Fire breath does 4D6 M.D. in a six-foot-wide blast to 100 feet, and smaller gouts can be sprayed 300 feet for 2D6 M.D.

unresolvedNotes: Select two secondary skills at level one and two more at levels 2, 4, 8, 10, and 15. Use only the dragon's I.Q. bonus on these skills.
Choose six minor psionic powers at first level and one more at levels 5, 10, and 15, all from one chosen discipline: Sensitive or Healing.
Choose one special interest at levels 1, 3, 6, 9, 12, and 15 from Languages, Literacy, Lore, or Research. If Research is not available, choose from the other listed interests.
Handle the rolled spell totals from the class text during advancement rather than treating them as fixed picks.

system.description: Swift, elusive forest dragon with chameleon scales, blinding poison breath, and an unusually broad major-psionic gift.
system.notes: Play this hatchling as a clever scout and escape artist. Forest Runners survive by staying unseen, staying mobile, and striking when their prey is helpless.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak Dragonese/Elven at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Literacy
occSkills.notes: Read and write Dragonese/Elven at the base skill percentage.

occSkills.name: Mathematics - Basic
occSkills.notes: Use Basic Math at the base skill percentage as an instinctive dragon skill.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Statistics
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll I.Q. 3D6+11, M.E. 3D6+9, M.A. 3D6+7, P.S. 3D6+6 (Supernatural), P.P. 3D6+6, P.E. 3D6+6, P.B. 3D6+11, and Spd 2D6x10+33 running or 4D6+12 flying. Horror Factor 10. Start with 1D4x100 M.D.C., 2D4x10 P.P.E., and 2D4x10 I.S.P.

grantedAbilities.name: Natural Dragon Abilities
grantedAbilities.notes: Nightvision 600 feet, hawk-like sight out to two miles, hearing sharp enough to catch a whisper at 300 feet, resistance to fire and cold for half damage, and bio-regeneration of 3D6 M.D.C. per melee round. Metamorphosis lasts three hours per level and teleport begins at 26% plus 2% per level.

grantedAbilities.name: Magic Knowledge
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling understands magic completely, can use Techno-Wizard gear instinctively, read magic, use scrolls, recognize circles and enchantment, sense ley lines and nexus points within 20 miles, and identify other dragons on sight even through metamorphosis.

grantedAbilities.name: Spell Learning
grantedAbilities.notes: Learn spells beginning at second level. By third level the dragon should know 2D4+2 spells from levels 1-3, by fifth level another 2D4+2 from levels 3-8, and thereafter three new spells per level up to its current experience level. Two spells can be cast per melee round, and Spell Strength rises by +1 at level 9.

grantedAbilities.name: Dragon Growth
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling reaches young adulthood at about 600 years of age. Adults increase mental attributes by 1D4+2 each, gain +1D6+4 to P.S. and P.P., +1D6+10 Spd, ten times the M.D.C., double all listed bonuses, and vastly greater I.S.P. and P.P.E.

grantedAbilities.name: Child of Magic
grantedAbilities.notes: Play the hatchling as a young dragon discovering the world. Alignment usually begins as Unprincipled or Anarchist, then settles into a final moral outlook by level three.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Gift
grantedAbilities.notes: Chameleon Scales let the dragon blend into natural surroundings with an 01-80% chance of remaining unseen while motionless or moving through matching cover. Poison Breath acts like tear gas and temporary blindness for 1D4+1 minutes unless victims save versus non-lethal poison on a 16 or higher.

unresolvedNotes: Select two secondary skills at level one and two more at levels 2, 4, 8, 10, and 15. Use only the dragon's I.Q. bonus on these skills.
Choose ten psionic powers at first level and two more at levels 3, 6, 9, 12, and 15 from Sensitive, Physical, or Healing.
Choose one special interest at levels 1, 3, 6, 9, 12, and 15 from Languages, Literacy, Lore, or Research. If Research is not available, choose from the other listed interests.
Handle the rolled spell totals from the class text during advancement rather than treating them as fixed picks.

system.description: Beautiful and terrifying hatchling aristocrat with master psionics, early spellcasting, paralysis breath, and powerful social presence.
system.notes: Play this hatchling as a born manipulator and sorcerous prodigy. Royal Frilled dragons enjoy mingling with humanoids in disguise and bending minds with charm, fear, and psychic force.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak Dragonese/Elven at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Literacy
occSkills.notes: Read and write Dragonese/Elven at the base skill percentage.

occSkills.name: Mathematics - Basic
occSkills.notes: Use Basic Math at the base skill percentage as an instinctive dragon skill.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Statistics
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll I.Q. 3D6+6, M.E. 3D6+5, M.A. 3D6+12, P.S. 4D6+10 (Supernatural), P.P. 3D6+6, P.E. 3D6+10, P.B. 3D6+16, and Spd 2D6+10 running or 2D6x10 flying. Horror Factor 11, or 13 when displaying the frill. Start with 1D6x100 M.D.C., 2D6x10+10 P.P.E., and 2D6x10 I.S.P.

grantedAbilities.name: Natural Dragon Abilities
grantedAbilities.notes: Nightvision 200 feet, see the invisible, Shadow Meld at will for 20 minutes at a time, resist fire and cold for half damage, immunity to all paralysis, and bio-regeneration of 1D10 M.D.C. per melee round. Metamorphosis lasts four hours per level and teleport begins at 34% plus 2% per level.

grantedAbilities.name: Magic Knowledge
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling understands magic completely, can use Techno-Wizard gear instinctively, read magic, use scrolls, recognize circles and enchantment, sense ley lines and nexus points within 20 miles, and identify other dragons on sight even through metamorphosis.

grantedAbilities.name: Spell Learning
grantedAbilities.notes: Learn spells beginning at second level. By third level the dragon should know 2D4+2 spells from levels 1-3, by fifth level another 2D4+2 from levels 3-8, and thereafter three new spells per level up to its current experience level. Two spells can be cast per melee round, and Spell Strength rises by +1 at level 9.

grantedAbilities.name: Dragon Growth
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling reaches young adulthood at about 600 years of age. Adults increase mental attributes by 1D4+2 each, gain +1D6+4 to P.S. and P.P., +1D6+10 Spd, ten times the M.D.C., double all listed bonuses, and vastly greater I.S.P. and P.P.E.

grantedAbilities.name: Child of Magic
grantedAbilities.notes: Play the hatchling as a young dragon discovering the world. Alignment usually begins as Unprincipled or Anarchist, then settles into a final moral outlook by level three.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Gift
grantedAbilities.notes: Paralyzing purple Poison Breath forces a save versus non-lethal poison on a 16 or higher or causes paralysis for 1D4+1 minutes. The vapors linger briefly and ignore ordinary air filters. The hatchling also begins play with six extra spells, three from level 1 and three from level 2.

unresolvedNotes: Select two secondary skills at level one and two more at levels 2, 4, 8, 10, and 15. Use only the dragon's I.Q. bonus on these skills.

Choose twelve psionic powers from Sensitive, Physical, or Healing at first level, plus two Super Psionics. Gain another Super Psionic at levels 5, 9, and 14, and two more non-super powers at levels 3, 6, 9, 12, and 15.
Choose one special interest at levels 1, 3, 6, 9, 12, and 15 from Languages, Literacy, Lore, or Research. If Research is not available, choose from the other listed interests.
Handle the rolled spell totals from the class text during advancement rather than treating them as fixed picks after the starting six spells.
The book continues adding powers at levels above 15; use the printed schedule if the campaign advances beyond the standard table.

system.description: Wingless northern dragon with frost breath, storm-form escape magic, and sturdy cold-proof resilience.
system.notes: Play this hatchling as a relentless ice-country predator that turns winter itself into cover, defense, and weapon.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak Dragonese/Elven at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Literacy
occSkills.notes: Read and write Dragonese/Elven at the base skill percentage.

occSkills.name: Mathematics - Basic
occSkills.notes: Use Basic Math at the base skill percentage as an instinctive dragon skill.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Statistics
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll I.Q. 3D6+10, M.E. 3D6+10, M.A. 3D6+6, P.S. 3D6+8 (Supernatural), P.P. 3D6+6, P.E. 3D6+12, P.B. 3D6+12, and Spd 1D6x10+26. The Snow Lizard cannot fly. Horror Factor 10. Start with 1D4x100+100 M.D.C., 2D4x10 P.P.E., and 1D6x10 I.S.P.

grantedAbilities.name: Natural Dragon Abilities
grantedAbilities.notes: Nightvision 200 feet, see the invisible, invisibility at will, total immunity to cold, effortless movement across snow and ice, and bio-regeneration of 1D10 M.D.C. per melee round. Metamorphosis lasts two hours per level and teleport begins at 20% plus 2% per level.

grantedAbilities.name: Magic Knowledge
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling understands magic completely, can use Techno-Wizard gear instinctively, read magic, use scrolls, recognize circles and enchantment, sense ley lines and nexus points within 20 miles, and identify other dragons on sight even through metamorphosis.

grantedAbilities.name: Spell Learning
grantedAbilities.notes: Learn spells beginning at second level. By third level the dragon should know 2D4+2 spells from levels 1-3, by fifth level another 2D4+2 from levels 3-8, and thereafter three new spells per level up to its current experience level. Two spells can be cast per melee round, and Spell Strength rises by +1 at level 9.

grantedAbilities.name: Dragon Growth
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling reaches young adulthood at about 600 years of age. Adults increase mental attributes by 1D4+2 each, gain +1D6+4 to P.S. and P.P., +1D6+10 Spd, ten times the M.D.C., double all listed bonuses, and vastly greater I.S.P. and P.P.E.

grantedAbilities.name: Child of Magic
grantedAbilities.notes: Play the hatchling as a young dragon discovering the world. Alignment usually begins as Unprincipled or Anarchist, then settles into a final moral outlook by level three.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Gift
grantedAbilities.notes: Snowstorm Transformation turns the dragon into a blizzard of blowing snow. In that form the hatchling is immune to physical and energy attacks except fire, slips through tiny openings, moves at 20 mph, and blankets a 20-foot radius in cold, obscuring snow. Frost Breath does 3D6 M.D. to a four-foot-wide line up to 100 feet.

unresolvedNotes: Select two secondary skills at level one and two more at levels 2, 4, 8, 10, and 15. Use only the dragon's I.Q. bonus on these skills.
Choose six minor psionic powers at first level and two more at levels 5, 10, and 15 from Sensitive, Physical, or Healing.
Choose one special interest at levels 1, 3, 6, 9, 12, and 15 from Languages, Literacy, Lore, or Research. If Research is not available, choose from the other listed interests.
Handle the rolled spell totals from the class text during advancement rather than treating them as fixed picks.

system.description: Sea-serpent dragon with a bladed saber tail, amphibious instincts, and major psionics rooted in Sensitive or Physical disciplines.
system.notes: Play this hatchling as a swift coastal predator and traveler. It is comfortable in sea, swamp, grassland, or mountain country so long as water is never far away.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak Dragonese/Elven at 98% proficiency.

occSkills.name: Literacy
occSkills.notes: Read and write Dragonese/Elven at the base skill percentage.

occSkills.name: Mathematics - Basic
occSkills.notes: Use Basic Math at the base skill percentage as an instinctive dragon skill.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Statistics
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll I.Q. 3D6+6, M.E. 3D6+4, M.A. 3D6+11, P.S. 3D6+6 (Supernatural), P.P. 3D6+8, P.E. 3D6+6, P.B. 2D6+12, and Spd 3D6+16 running, 2D6x10 swimming, or 1D4x10+40 flying. Horror Factor 11. Start with 1D4x100 M.D.C., 3D4x10+10 P.P.E., and 2D4x10 I.S.P.

grantedAbilities.name: Natural Dragon Abilities
grantedAbilities.notes: Nightvision 500 feet, hawk-like vision that also works in dark or murky water, invisibility underwater or in rain, resistance to fire and cold for half damage, a prehensile tail, regrowth of severed limbs in 1D4 hours, and bio-regeneration of 1D10 M.D.C. per melee round. The dragon breathes air and water, swims at 98%, and can read tides, currents, and weather shifts.

grantedAbilities.name: Magic Knowledge
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling understands magic completely, can use Techno-Wizard gear instinctively, read magic, use scrolls, recognize circles and enchantment, sense ley lines and nexus points within 20 miles, and identify other dragons on sight even through metamorphosis.

grantedAbilities.name: Spell Learning
grantedAbilities.notes: Learn spells beginning at second level. By third level the dragon should know 2D4+2 spells from levels 1-3, by fifth level another 2D4+2 from levels 3-8, and thereafter three new spells per level up to its current experience level. Two spells can be cast per melee round, and Spell Strength rises by +1 at level 9.

grantedAbilities.name: Dragon Growth
grantedAbilities.notes: The hatchling reaches young adulthood at about 600 years of age. Adults increase mental attributes by 1D4+2 each, gain +1D6+4 to P.S. and P.P., +1D6+10 Spd, ten times the M.D.C., double all listed bonuses, and vastly greater I.S.P. and P.P.E.

grantedAbilities.name: Child of Magic
grantedAbilities.notes: Play the hatchling as a young dragon discovering the world. Alignment usually begins as Unprincipled or Anarchist, then settles into a final moral outlook by level three.

grantedAbilities.name: Species Gift
grantedAbilities.notes: Fire Breath does 2D6 M.D. to one target out to 100 feet and becomes a jet of boiling water underwater at half range. The saber tail does punch damage plus 2D6 M.D. and one attack each melee is always with the prehensile tail.

unresolvedNotes: Select two secondary skills at level one and two more at levels 2, 4, 8, 10, and 15. Use only the dragon's I.Q. bonus on these skills.
Choose ten psionic powers at first level and one more at levels 3, 6, 9, 12, and 15 from Sensitive or Physical.
Choose one special interest at levels 1, 3, 6, 9, 12, and 15 from Languages, Literacy, Lore, or Research. If Research is not available, choose from the other listed interests.
Handle the rolled spell totals from the class text during advancement rather than treating them as fixed picks.
